title: NEVER LOSE
lyrics:
[LEX × OZworld「NEVER LOSE」の歌詞]

[Intro]
(You are now connected to Chaki Zulu)
(Husky Studio)

[Chorus: LEX]
俺 never lose, find me city lights
Show time, judgement
Winner 今も
俺 never lose, find me city lights
Show time, judgement
Winner 今も

[Verse 1: LEX]
Lightning イナズマは めがける my heart
Shining 割れ目 顔出し screaming, ah
Show time, judgement 負けには平手
Shining 割れ目 顔出し screaming, ah
(Pu-pu-pu-pu)
俺放つぜ my 才能
(Pu-pu-pu-pu)
医者でも俺測定不能
(Pu-pu-pu-pu)
また変えてく destiny
(Pu-pu-pu-pu)
医者でも俺測定不能

[Chorus: LEX]
俺 never lose, find me city lights
Show time, judgement
Winner 今も
俺 never lose, find me city lights
Show time, judgement
Winner 今も

[Verse 2: LEX]
Ayе, aye, aye
過去にタイムスリップ yeah
そこで君とさ食べるよミートパスタ
Ayе, aye, aye
なにも not afraid, yeah
Atm もっと money, B.B. simon, one, two, three, four

[Chorus: LEX]
俺 never lose, find me city lights
Show time, judgement
Winner 今も
俺 never lose, find me city lights
Show time, judgement
Winner 今も

[Verse 3: OZworld]
今を生きて気付かずに死ぬ yeah
思い残す事なく今日を生きる yeah
IPhone 確認 check する DM
残像 up してる twenty nineteen, OZ (Woo)
俺ら街 walking 曲がってる city, yeah
人って書いても読み方は alien
優雅な暮らし time is money それ間違いねえ
Not gonna lose to my self 己に勝つゲーム (Oh, yeah)
俺も never lose
ほしい more lights
ご機嫌なのは 楽しい今
正直 夢じゃない
限界なんて no
I want gameの中に今

[Chorus: LEX]
俺 never lose, find me city lights
Show time, judgement
Winner 今も
俺 never lose, find me city lights
